title: Feature: Docker Worker First-Class Execution — real code generation inside sandbox containers

steps.description: Enrich task metadata in supervisor.rs: (1) when creating a HexFlo tracking task for a workplan step, JSON-encode the full WorkplanStep struct + output_dir into the task description field; (2) add HEX_OUTPUT_DIR env var to docker run args in spawn_workers so workers have the output dir even without task metadata. In supervisor.rs: update create_tracking_task to accept an optional WorkplanStep and serialise it into the task description as JSON. In spawn_workers: add -e HEX_OUTPUT_DIR=<abs_output> to the docker run command args.
steps.done_condition: cargo check passes; task description field contains WorkplanStep JSON when inspected via hex task status; docker worker receives HEX_OUTPUT_DIR env var

steps.description: Implement real hex-coder worker in agent.rs execute_worker_task: (1) deserialise WorkplanStep from task description JSON (fall back to title-only stub if missing); (2) read output_dir from HEX_OUTPUT_DIR env var (default /workspace); (3) call CodePhase::execute_step with the step and inferred language; (4) write generated file to output_dir using the file_path from CodePhaseResult; (5) run compile check (go build ./... for Go, cargo check for Rust, tsc --noEmit for TS) in output_dir; (6) run test check (go test ./... / cargo test / bun test) and capture pass/fail + output; (7) store structured result in hexflo memory under key {task_id}:result as JSON: {file_path, content_len, compile_pass, tests_pass, test_output}; (8) return summary string. _project_dir parameter renamed to output_dir and actually used.
steps.done_condition: hex agent worker --role hex-coder picks up an assigned task, writes a file to /workspace, compiles it, stores result in hexflo memory; cargo check passes

steps.description: Update supervisor.rs worker delegation path: after poll_result returns Ok(()), read {task_id}:result from hexflo memory via GET /api/hexflo/memory/{key}. Parse the JSON result struct and apply to ObjectiveState: set code_generated=true if file_path is non-empty, compile_pass from result, tests_pass from result. This replaces the current poll-only path that throws away the worker result. Add a helper fn read_worker_result(task_id) -> Option<WorkerResult> to avoid duplication.
steps.done_condition: After worker completes, supervisor's ObjectiveState reflects compile_pass and tests_pass from the worker's actual run; cargo check passes

steps.description: Remove the if false && guard in execute_agent_tracked (supervisor.rs line ~1434). Change: `if false && self.has_worker_for_role(role)` to `if self.has_worker_for_role(role)`. Worker delegation is now live for all roles when a Docker worker is registered. Inline fallback path remains unchanged for when no worker is available (no Docker or hex-agent:latest image missing).
steps.done_condition: cargo check passes; running hex dev start with Docker available shows 'delegating to worker' log line instead of inline execution

steps.description: Integration test: write a test in hex-cli/src/pipeline/supervisor.rs (or tests/) that: (1) spawns a mock worker that writes a known file to a temp dir and marks the task complete via nexus; (2) verifies the supervisor's ObjectiveState reflects compile_pass=true after delegation. Also manually verify end-to-end: run hex dev start --auto from repo root with Docker available; confirm output shows worker delegation log, file written in Docker mount, commit contains correct paths at examples/<slug>/.
steps.done_condition: cargo test passes; manual end-to-end run shows files committed at correct non-nested path via Docker worker execution

mergeOrder: P0.1 → P1.1 (need metadata before worker can use it)
P1.1 → P2.1 (need worker result format before supervisor can read it)
P2.1 → P3.1 (need objective state wired before enabling delegation)

riskRegister.risk: Worker file writes land in Docker /workspace but supervisor checks host abs_output path for compile — paths must match
riskRegister.mitigation: Worker writes to /workspace (Docker mount of abs_output); supervisor compile check runs on host abs_output which is the same volume

riskRegister.risk: CodePhase::execute_step API may not match what worker needs (missing model/provider context)
riskRegister.mitigation: Worker reads HEX_MODEL and HEX_PROVIDER env vars same as supervisor; CodePhase::from_env() handles this

riskRegister.risk: Docker container may not have Go/Rust/Node toolchain needed for compile check
riskRegister.mitigation: hex-agent:latest Dockerfile must include all toolchains; compile check is best-effort (worker reports result, supervisor decides)

riskRegister.risk: Large generated file content stored in hexflo memory may hit size limits
riskRegister.mitigation: Store only file_path + content_len + compile/test results in memory; actual content is on disk via Docker mount

successCriteria: hex dev start with Docker shows 'Delegating hex-coder to worker' instead of inline execution
Generated files appear in examples/<slug>/ on host via Docker bind mount
Supervisor ObjectiveState (CodeCompiles, TestsPass) reflects worker's actual compile/test results
Pipeline completes and commits files at correct non-nested path
Inline fallback still works when Docker unavailable (hex-agent:latest not present)
